shortAnswer: Nitrite in urine forms when certain bacteria convert nitrate present in urine, and is a strong indicator of a urinary tract infection. A positive result is usually assessed together with white blood cells in urine and your symptoms.
metaDescription: Nitrite in urine positive? Meaning for urinary tract infections explained simply.
causesElevated: Bacterial colonization of the urinary tract
doctorQuestions: Does this finding confirm a urinary tract infection?
